lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner for laying out an AX Gauss fit on this hull.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Krait Phantom ship page — manufacturer specs, speed/agility figures, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Hardpoint and slot layout, utility mounts, and core-module ratings used to size the AX loadout.

sources.label: Inara — Krait Phantom
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, hull price and rebuy reference for the AX cost figures.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Krait Phantom hull profile, hardpoint count, and the absence of a fighter hangar relevant to its AX role.
